title: Dry Bulk Shipping - November 20, 2018
summary: Capesize rates collapse - Capesize rates experienced their steepest two-week decline in four years, Reasons vs. Catalysts - In the last few months, Chinese demand has been experiencing signs of a gradual Now what? - It is hard to see how freight rates will remain at this level for a long period of time.
